programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Infiltrated

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Inconceivable

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Cruel and Unusual: Botched Executions
programme.desc: Lethal injection has experienced a series of botched executions in several states including Ohio, Arizona, and Oklahoma.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.desc: When George rigs the results of a productivity contest at the factory against Benny's favour, Benny seeks revenge. Succeeding, Benny leaves George up all night, dreaming about his dysfunctional childhood.

programme.title: George Lopez: It's a Cliffhanger, By George
programme.desc: Everything hangs in the balance for the Lopez family when Ernie tells George the factory is moving to Mexico, the police want to question Benny, Angie is waiting the results of a home pregnancy test, and Carmen worries about a college acceptance letter.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's Mom Faces Hard Tambien
programme.desc: George and Angie begin looking forward to being empty nesters as Carmen prepares for college. Meanwhile Benny may face hard times.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's House Has Two Empty Wombs
programme.desc: In an effort to keep George from missing Carmen, Angie maintains her story that she's pregnant. Meanwhile, Vic introduces his young and beautiful fiancée to the family.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Testi-Lies for Benny
programme.desc: When Benny's mother, lawyer and the judge all turn against her, it's up to George to keep her out of jail.

programme.title: George Lopez: Sabes Gay, It's George's Fantasy Episode
programme.desc: George drinks a liquor shot with a worm still in it and hallucinates that he and Ernie are gay and about to be married to each other.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Thinks Vic's Fiancée Is Lion About Being a Cheetah
programme.desc: George seeks help from a popular reality TV game show in order to expose Vic's cheating, gold-digging fiancée.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Helps Angie's Wha-Positive Self Image
programme.desc: When Angie gets concerned about losing her looks, George asks his gorgeous young niece to tone down her sex appeal.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's Grave Mistake Sends Him to a Funeral, Holmes
programme.desc: George's poor memory comes back to haunt him when Angie's mother passes away.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Joins the Neighborhood Wha-tcha and Raises the Vigil-ante
programme.desc: George and Angie have 'the talk' with Max when a sexual predator moves in the neighbourhood.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Is Maid to Be Ruth-Less
programme.desc: Much to Benny's dismay, George and Angie hire a maid who quickly cooks and cleans her way into George's heart.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Is Lie-able for Benny's Unhappiness
programme.desc: When the love of Benny's life returns to town, George builds a web of lies to keep them from reuniting.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Rocks to the Max and Gets Diss-Band-ed
programme.desc: In an episode directed by award-winning film actor, Andy Garcia, George tries to relive his high school days by teaching Max to play the guitar, but when Max moves on without his dad and joins a rock band, George wishes he could take it all back.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Gets Smoking Mad at Benny and Develops an Oral Fixation
programme.desc: When Power Aviation institutes a smoking ban, Benny's nicotine withdrawals drive George to self-destructive behaviour.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's Bogey-ous Relationship With Vic Is Putt to the Test
programme.desc: Vic feigns fatherly love so George will play in a father-son golf tournament against his long time rival and son, Tony.

programme.title: Full House: Our Very First Christmas Show
programme.desc: The Tanners dream of a white Christmas in Colorado, but are snowed in at the airport.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boating Buddies/ Krabby Kronicle
programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Pteranodon't!
programme.desc: A young park guest accidentally strands himself in the Pteranodon aviary, requiring Owen and a testy Stygimoloch to stage a daring rescue.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups in a Jam/ Pups Save a Windsurfing Pig
programme.desc: It's the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants. It's up to the pups to lure the ants to safety. Zuma is on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Frozen Camp-Out/ Pups Save the Fizzy Pickles
programme.desc: Alex and Mr. Porter are on a tropical island camping trip when a freak snowstorm hits.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: A Very Guppy Christmas!
programme.desc: Molly and Gil meet the familiar Mr. Claws and his horse Snowflake. Mr Claws and Snowflake come to the rescue when Mr. Groupers van gets stuck in the snow. The guppies experience their first sleigh ride.

programme.title: Ricky Zoom: Ricky's on a Roll/ Rock the Float
programme.desc: On his way to help DJ and his parents, Ricky gets stuck inside the adventure park Bike Sphere. DJ is asked to pull a Steel Awesome float for the Hero Day parade, but he doesn't know if he's strong enough.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Puplantis
programme.desc: Sid Swashbuckle the Pirate and his first pup mate, Arrby, steal the giant pearl-making shell that gives Puplantis its magic.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Kitty Rescue Crew/ Pups Save an Ostrich
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger makes fake emergencies for his kitties to save so they appear better then the PAW Patrol. The Wingnuts get a new pet ostrich, but it gets lost on the trip home.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Playdate With Magenta!
programme.desc: Blue’s friend Magenta is coming over today. We play Blue's Clues to figure out what Blue wants to do with Magenta. During our search for clues, we identify opposites and check out animal footprint with our friends Shovel & Pail.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Pups Winter Wonder Show
programme.desc: The Adventure Bay Snow-Show is in danger of being a no-show when Mayor Humdinger escapes with the feature act, Cap'n Turbot's performing penguins. It's up to the PAW Patrol, with Tracker's help, to return the penguins so that the show can go on.

programme.title: Ryan's Mystery Playdate: Ryan's Merry Playdate
programme.desc: With the help of festive friends, Ryan must deck the halls with 12 challenge victories to prepare for the hopeful arrival of the big guy himself.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Blaze Christmas
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are helping Santa and his elves load his magic bag full of presents when Crusher, who wants to open his present early, knocks it over, sending all the presents flying away! Now they have to rescue and deliver the presents before morning.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Balloon Pups/ Pups Save the Spider Spies
programme.desc: Giant balloons have floated away from a parade and it's up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger. The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider but get stuck in its web.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save a Runaway Stargazer
programme.desc: A comet is coming, and the PAW Patrol gets to work building a giant observatory! When the observatory starts rolling out-of-control, Rubble and the pups need to rebuild everything it has destroyed in this Ultimate Construction Rescue.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patchy the Pirate Presents the SpongeBob SquarePants Christmas Special
programme.desc: When Sandy tells the residents of Bikini Bottom about Christmas, SpongeBob wants to bring the holiday to the town. His enthusiasm is infectious, but everyone blames SpongeBob when Santa is a no show on Christmas morning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Quakes and Mountain Lions

programme.desc: Video footage of deadly lightning, wicked winds and high-tides are featured. Also, what to do when forced to give birth in a blinding blizzard and how to survive a seismic shocker from 55 stories in the air.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Janelle James Headlines
programme.desc: The always funny Janelle James headlines tonight. Plus, Blaq Ron gives a brief history lesson on line dancing, Kerry Coddett contemplates alternate styles of dating and Reggie Conquest has a PSA for kids.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ronnie Jordan Headlines
programme.desc: Headliner Ronnie Jordan brings the heat tonight and is joined by funny woman Jade Catta-Preta as she shares the secret to relationship success. Plus, Blaq Ron gets a salsa lesson.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Misery Index: You Better Watch Your Filthy Mouth
programme.desc: A bad wedding officiant and someone who sent inappropriate texts to their mom battle it for the grand prize.

programme.title: The Misery Index: So That's Murder Then?

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Botched: Man Boobs

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Tips
programme.desc: Apple and Onion try to fit in to life in the big city.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Console
programme.desc: Elmore becomes trapped inside a fantasy RPG world when Gumball is given a cursed videogame console. Gumball, Darwin and Anais have to battle their way through town, unraveling the secrets of their new virtual reality and leveling up to defeat the Boss.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Awareness
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin try to be more green resulting in the school being overrun by vines.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Box
programme.desc: The Wattersons receive an unmarked package in the mail. To distract themselves from the urge to open it they all take turns to imagine what it might contain.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Stink
programme.desc: Mr. Small goes feral after Gumball and Darwin expose his hypocrisy.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Gumball catches Darwin gazing wistfully at a photo of Teri on Elmore Plus and secretly enlists Carrie to help bring them together.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Ad
programme.desc: The Wattersons are forced to rent their house to a pair of elderly fainting goats.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Vase
programme.desc: Sick of Granny Jojo's ugly gifts, Nicole encourages the kids to take matters into their own hands and accidentally break her latest hideous vase. When Gumball, Darwin and Anais try to destroy it, they discover it is more robust than it seems.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Understanding
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin get into trouble misunderstanding a new kid in school.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Potato
programme.desc: After lunch with Idaho, Darwin decides to stop eating potatoes. When he finds it harder to kick his favourite carb habit than he thought, Gumball decides to try to help.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Spinoffs
programme.desc: Rob creates a variety of spinoff Elmore shows and formats in order to replace Gumball.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Copycats
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin meet Kiki and Quack, a pair of siblings that copy everything they do and say. When they realize their whole family is making money online imitating the Wattersons, they realize they need a solution.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Potion
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin use a magic potion to shrink Hector.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Outside
programme.desc: The family goes to visit Richard's dad. Based on his basic living standards and extended absence from Richard's life, they assume Frankie must have done a stretch in the slammer. When he visits, they decide to turn their house into a prison.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Intelligence
programme.desc: Technology reaches human intelligence then becomes dysfunctional as it picks up human flaws.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Fuss
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are planning on seeing the scariest movie of the year, but everyone else has already seen it, and won't stop talking about it. Gumball is determined to avoid spoilers.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Transformation
programme.desc: Gumball is asked to settle a dispute between Penny and her family.

programme.title: American Dad!: Bazooka Steve

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: House of 1000 Bounces

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Squeal of Dreams
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is fielding farm calls all over Isabella County now that the spring birthing season is in full swing.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dog-a-POL-ooza
programme.desc: It’s all dogs all day this week at Pol Veterinary Services. Dogs are an incredibly important part of the Pols’ life, as both personal pets and clients. From unclaimed strays to nosey farm dogs, there’s no pup Dr. Pol and crew won’t treat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Back to the Suture
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: My Fair Piggy
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair is just around the corner, which means Dr. Pol, Dr. Emily and Dr. Brenda are busy treating fair animals, making sure they are in tiptop shape for competition.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya
programme.desc: Deep in the jungle, the lost city of Tikal holds the dark secrets of the Maya, and now, a new investigation uncovers how it grew into a megacity home to 100,000 people, and why it was mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: The Kush Empire was an ancient superpower that dominated the Nile Valley and rivaled the Egyptians, and now, a new, cutting-edge investigation at a mysterious tomb could reveal the secrets of this formidable lost kingdom.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: The Kush Empire was an ancient superpower that dominated the Nile Valley and rivaled the Egyptians, and now, a new, cutting-edge investigation at a mysterious tomb could reveal the secrets of this formidable lost kingdom.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: The Kush Empire was an ancient superpower that dominated the Nile Valley and rivaled the Egyptians, and now, a new, cutting-edge investigation at a mysterious tomb could reveal the secrets of this formidable lost kingdom.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Mystery of Doomsday Jungle
programme.desc: When 400 earthquakes strike a remote jungle in Mexico over just two weeks, dozens of UFO sightings are reported nearby, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this bizarre event is the smoking gun evidence of alien contact.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: The Volcano Enigma
programme.desc: New evidence points to a strange link between UFO sightings and volcanoes, and to test the explosive theory, a team of experts investigate one of the most mysterious mass reports of alien contact in history.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Alien Crater of Doom
programme.desc: New discoveries of strange evidence in the forests of Argentina suggest an alien craft landed here, and to prove it, a team of experts use cutting edge technology to investigate the area and hunt down the truth.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Hunt for the Alien Relics
programme.desc: New clues suggest that aliens were in contact with the ancient cultures of Mesoamerica, and to prove it, a team of experts hunt down mysterious artifacts that could change everything we know about our place in the cosmos.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: A team of experts use the latest science and cutting-edge technology to investigate if extraterrestrial life has contacted humankind, and what they discover could reveal if there's an international conspiracy to cover it all up.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: US Navy vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Evidence from a top-secret file reveals the unsolved mystery of an American aircraft carrier's strange encounter with a UFO, and a team of experts use the latest tech and a vital eyewitness to investigate the true story.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: War on the Amazon
programme.desc: A remote island on the Amazon is the site of an alleged alien attack, and a team of experts use the latest tech and first-hand testimony to investigate what really happened during this sinister incident.

programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.desc: Deputy Mendez and the Fugitive Task Force search for a career criminal before another victim is robbed, assaulted, or worse.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Houdini

programme.desc: Detectives scour the streets to find people who are willing to provide information on a fugitive's whereabouts.

programme.desc: Two officers are helped by the K9 Unit to corral a suspect who takes off running after a car chase. Rush and Rutledge struggle to convince a man with heart problems to go to the hospital. A car careens off a bridge and the driver can't be found.

programme.desc: Baton Rouge paramedics rush to the aid of a man attacked by his girlfriend with a box-cutter knife. Gunshots fired in Yonkers send Ariel and Cunningham to save a man down. In Austin, first responders plead with a patient to go to the hospital.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Corporal Rich Emberlin and Corporal Robert Cockerill must charge into a house to nab a murder suspect who allegedly knifed his neighbour to death; in their off hours, Emberlin tries desperately to get his ex-girlfriend back and Cockerill gets in shape.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A star athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The young man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life and the events of his last night on earth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Timothy Peart's Last Dance
programme.desc: When a teen is killed at a party, police question the guests and wonder if they're all part of a cover-up. Then A reported suicide leaves Kenda with doubts. Did the victim take his life to end his troubles, or did his troubled past catch up to him?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: New Year's Evil
programme.desc: It's New Year's Eve weekend, and in the midst of the revelry Miguel Mendez is beaten to death outside a convenience store. Lt. Joe Kenda faces a challenging investigation, his only clues coming from a drunken witness and Miguel's strange injuries.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff's deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight. When he's found dead in his patrol car the next morning, his fellow lawmen must set aside their grief and hunt down his killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Widow's War
programme.desc: A marine colonel fatally wounded in Iraq was said to have died by suicide, but his wife claims it was murder. See the story of a family's quest to change the medical examiner's findings in a case that tests convincing and competing forensic theories.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Classified Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating a couple's mysterious disappearance uncover a trail of terrifying clues.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Mystery in Indio
programme.desc: As investigators study the chilling crime scene inside Wendi Brant's horse ranch, one thing seems clear, the 45-year-old had been brutally killed by someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Classified Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating a couple's mysterious disappearance uncover a trail of terrifying clues.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Mystery in Indio
programme.desc: As investigators study the chilling crime scene inside Wendi Brant's horse ranch, one thing seems clear, the 45-year-old had been brutally killed by someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Widow's War
programme.desc: A marine colonel fatally wounded in Iraq was said to have died by suicide, but his wife claims it was murder. See the story of a family's quest to change the medical examiner's findings in a case that tests convincing and competing forensic theories.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Any Other Day
programme.desc: When Shirlee Sherman and Thomas Hunter are found stabbed to death in an upscale home in Omaha, Nebraska, suspects and clues are in short supply. It will take Detectives five years to zero on a perpetrator, but not before he kills again.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: My Lacie
programme.desc: Charisse Christopher escapes her abusive husband and sets up a new, safe home with her three-year-old son Nicholas and her baby Lacie. Several months later, the police discover a scene of slaughter which isn't quite what it seems.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: Just hours after a popular teenager is reported missing, her lifeless body is discovered under a nearby bridge. Police will have to sort through her puzzling last hours alive to bring a ruthless killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: No GoodByes
programme.desc: A mother arrives home to have lunch with her teenage daughter and walks into a nightmare she will never forget.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Coralville
programme.desc: A young woman is found shot to death off the side of a dirt road. Police hope their best clue, the bullet found at the scene, will unmask her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Without a Trace
programme.desc: When 29-year-old Carrie Olson doesn’t show up for work and is reported missing, an entire community pulls together in the search. Detectives suspect foul play and soon focus their investigation on two men in her life.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Intent
programme.desc: A woman's truck explodes outside of her workplace and terrorism is suspected. Her family may not appear to be picture perfect.

programme.title: Dateline: Death in the Driveway
programme.desc: In a quiet Southern town, police find a prominent lawyer brutally murdered and his girlfriend bound in duct tape. Investigators pursue a long list of leads, until they zero in on a surprising suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Denial
programme.desc: A husband comes home to find his wife stabbed to death in their home. With little hard evidence to work with, detectives began digging into the couple's complicated past.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Secrets in the Cars
programme.desc: After a night out with friends, 20-year-old Jaleayah Davis is found dead in the midst of a horrifying scene. And 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, drives two hours to show her boyfriend a sonogram of the baby, but never makes it home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Dangerous Houses
programme.desc: 18-year-old Brookelyn Farthing disappears in 2013 after attending a party in the small town of Berea, Kentucky. And then, 24-year-old Lindsay Buziak, a young beautiful realtor, is found brutally killed after showing some new clients a million-dollar home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Midnight Murders
programme.desc: Carla Stefaniak, a spirited Florida insurance agent with a passion for travel, heads to Costa Rica. But on the day she's supposed to return, she vanishes. And in 2014, 19-year-old college student Pravin Varughese disappears after a party.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brick by Brick Restoration
programme.desc: The Summit mansion hasn't been painted since 1972 and needs a major face lift. After years of damage, all of the outdoor wood railing and detail are rotting and need to be replaced.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brightening the Bedrooms
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the upstairs bedrooms and bathroom which have had their natural beauty covered in old wallpaper and fixtures.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Up and Away
programme.desc: Nicole puts a modern twist on the 1904 Summit Mansion in St. Paul when she installs an elevator in the middle of the home.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Too Close for Comfort

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Honey Bucket
programme.desc: Nick races to finish his cabin before his mom visits again. Bears are still a threat, so Nick makes sure the electric fence is working. Nick and Kent design and build a "honey bucket," also known as an Alaskan toilet.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Home Stretch
programme.desc: All the builders are in the home stretch in Alaska as they try to finish their cabins. Jere and Ben install interior and exterior siding. Nick's roof is dried in, so he turns to finishing the sleeping loft.

programme.title: Living Alaska: High-Flying Adventure

programme.title: Living Alaska: North Pole Pursuit

programme.title: Living Alaska: Backyard Bears in Palmer

programme.desc: Stewart Cogswell received a job offer in Alaska and is eager to move his wife De Anna and their four teenagers out of their hometown of Marinette, WI, and into an Alaskan dream home.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mushroom House
programme.desc: Sage Stoneman teams up with world-renowned natural builder SunRay Kelley to experiment with a never-before-used building material: mushrooms! Follow along as they not only design a mushroom-shaped house, but virtually grow one.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Treasure Hunting
programme.desc: Rob and his right-hand man, Wes, are on a treasure hunt for their next project in Palm Beach, Florida. They check out four properties, but they all need a ton of work. After a scary situation leaves them spooked, the choice is clear.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Shell Shocked
programme.desc: After surveying the property and running the numbers, Rob determines they have to start from scratch. It becomes a race against time as he and the crew only have 90 days to demo and rebuild the shell.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Pool Problems
programme.desc: At Rob's latest project, the current state of the pool spells disaster. It's small and square, not to mention filthy, so Rob designs a whole new look for this outdated eyesore to make it pool party-worthy.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Icing on the Kitchen
programme.desc: The current kitchen at Rob's project in Palm Beach lacks the space and grace that Rob is looking for. He and the ninjas come up with a plan to give the heart of the home a full face lift with plenty of bling.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Tree Lighting
programme.desc: Four talented cupcake bakers compete for the chance to have their delicious displays featured at a star-studded holiday tree lighting ceremony in the heart of Hollywood.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tacos Del Carnival
programme.desc: Tacos are more than a staple of Mexican cuisine, they're a carnival favorite. Join Noah as he eats seven of the nation's most creative tacos. From a fresh succulent Soft Shell Crab Taco to authentic Tacos Al Pastor.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Italiano
programme.desc: Noah tries a clever calzone-Lasagna hybrid and a special pizza and pasta combo.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 'tis The Season
programme.desc: Why save your holiday favorites for the holidays, when you can enjoy them year-round at the fair! Some of your favorite holiday dishes get the carnival eats treatment.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew explores Houston's Tex-Mex fajitas, Czech pastry, and Cajun mashups.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charleston
programme.desc: Andrew explores coastal classics like shrimp and grits, she-crab soup, and barbecue.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Brew-Haha

programme.title: Simply Laura: Laura's Leftovers
programme.desc: There is nothing more fun and creative than making a new meal from yesterday's leftovers. Laura demonstrates her tricks for turning everyday leftovers into a delicious meal.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Lessons From Nonna
programme.desc: Laura's passion for food and cooking was inspired by her Italian grandmother, who taught her not only how to cook, but how to spread love through food. Today Laura takes you on a very personal journey through her some of her Nonna's favorite dishes.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Date Night
programme.desc: Laura creates a date-night dinner at home from fresh ingredients, without a hefty price tag. Seared New York Strip steak takes center plate, but no steak dinner is complete without the sides, and no date night complete without flowers.

programme.title: Simply Laura: 15-Minute Meals
programme.desc: Laura has a busy day and only has 15 minutes for each of her meals.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Family Game Night
programme.desc: Laura Vitale hosts a casual game night. Everyone has a job to do, including Papa Sal, who joins Laura to prepare his spicy steamed mussels. Her guests make their selections from the classic Italian antipasti and enjoy short rib and béchamel lasagna.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Family Style
programme.desc: Entertaining friends and family should be fun, but it isn't always the case. Laura shows us her secret to an impressive and stress free family meal.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Breakfast in Bed
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is preparing a 'breakfast in bed' style brunch. Bobby wines and dines in bed with an indulgent menu of baked eggs with prosciutto, candied tomatoes and herb parmesan cream, and chocolate covered berries.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Open House Brunch
programme.desc: An open house style brunch includes orange spiced crumb cake and creamy scrambled eggs.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wake Up Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's coffee-inspired creations include Scrambled Eggs with Sweet Potato Biscuits, Ham Steak & Red Eye Gravy, and Espresso-Chocolate Chip Banana Bread with Espresso.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: A French Countryside Picnic
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's in the mood for a brunch-style picnic in the style of the French countryside.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Tasty Trattoria Brunch
programme.desc: Decadent cinnamon mascarpone pancakes with warm morello cherries and hazelnut.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Say Cheese
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay knows that cheese makes everything better, and brunch is no exception. He serves up some cheese-filled dishes like Meyer lemon ricotta crepes with candied almonds, a frittata with thyme roasted potatoes, smoked mozzarella and tomato-basil.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Cuisine du Jour
programme.desc: Bobby whisks us away to the South of France as he cooks up a delicious brunch menu inspired by one of his favorite places. All good French food is accompanied by a Baguette and Bobby toasts his with Goat Cheese.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Tuscan Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby creates an awesome menu inspired by one of his favourite places - Tuscany.

programme.title: DuckTales: Last Christmas!
programme.desc: Scrooge celebrates Christmas with his time-traveling ghost buddies while time-lost Dewey teams with Young Donald to find his mom on Christmas.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Goblin War: Part Four
programme.desc: Spider-Man and his friends must stop the Goblin King before he destroys New York City.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: Nightmare on Christmas
programme.desc: Spider-Man sees what the world would be like without him when Nightmare takes the web-slinger on a journey through his past, present, and future.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: The Moon Knight Before Christmas
programme.desc: While house-sitting on Christmas Eve, Spider-Man is forced to team up with Moon Knight to defend the home from the new Mysterio.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Jingle Bell Rock
programme.desc: The team stages a Christmas carol inspired con job in order to frighten a despot out of his ill-gotten riches and free his enslaved people.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Unfortunate Son
programme.desc: Quill must bust his father in order to save the Guardians from the ruthless Korvac.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: The Road to Goblin War
programme.desc: Spider-Man must take down the slick new villain, Slyde, as he steals various chemicals from around the city in effort to create a deadly virus that could wipe out New York.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Welcome to the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Rendezvous Point
programme.desc: Doza attempts to meet a Resistance pilot from his past. Meanwhile the pilot has been captured by the First Order.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: The Voxx Vortex 5000
programme.desc: The Colossus is running out of money. Hype takes the Aces to race at Vranki’s Casino, run by Vranki the Hutt, hoping to win big… or lose everything.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast? / Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Fright Before Creepmas
programme.desc: Mavis heads to the underworld to meet Krampus, hoping he can fix a thousand-year-old error that will allow Lydia to let everyone enjoy a family Creepmas.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Exit Sandman/ Roadkill Trip
programme.desc: Mavis and the group rebuild Diane's chicken coop, but their efforts are interrupting the Sandman's sleeping patterns. His solution is to cast a spell on them. When Mavis and Uncle Gene learn that the Roadkill Grill is closing, they plan a road trip.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Rivalry Weak
programme.desc: Honey Lemon secretly takes art classes at SFIT’s rival, SFAI, and soon finds herself caught in the middle of both schools’ annual Rivalry Week.

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Seven: 2000-2009
programme.desc: Nick Saban comes to LSU in 2000 and eventually wins the Tigers' first national championship since 1958 - a feat matched by Les Miles. At Florida, Tim Tebow becomes a cult hero and wins two national titles with Urban Meyer's Gators.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Eight: 2010-2019
programme.desc: The SEC has a run of seven straight national titles, and nine in 12 years. Expansion in 2012 gives the conference 14 schools. Meanwhile, Nick Saban arguably becomes the greatest coach in the history of college football.

programme.title: The Battle of AmfAR
programme.desc: The story of Elizabeth Taylor and Dr. Mathilde Krim and their pioneering efforts creating the American Foundation for AIDS Research (amfAR).

programme.title: Movie: Jobs
programme.desc: Explores the life and career of college dropout and creative entrepreneur, Steve Jobs.

programme.title: Movie: Head Full of Honey
programme.desc: A grandfather suffering from Alzheimer's disease puts a strain on his son's marriage with his deteriorating condition, but his granddaughter is determined to help him. Without telling her parents, she runs off with her grandfather to Venice.

programme.title: His Dark Materials: Armour
programme.desc: Lyra and the Gyptians arrive in the North, and seek the help of the Witches' Consul, Texan aeronaut Lee Scoresby and an armored bear in service to the town.

programme.title: Movie: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: To her family's displeasure, a young girl falls in love with an orphaned woodcutter. The couple plans to run away together until they learn that her sister has been killed by a werewolf terrorizing their village.

programme.title: Very Ralph
programme.desc: 'Very Ralph' is the first documentary portrait of fashion icon Ralph Lauren, revealing the man behind the icon and the creation of one of the most successful brands in fashion history.

programme.title: Watchmen: It's Summer and We're Running Out of Ice
programme.desc: In an alternate America where police conceal their identities behind masks to protect themselves from a terrorist organization, Detective Angela Abar and Chief Judd Crawford investigate the attempted murder of a cop.

programme.title: Watchmen: Martial Feats of Comanche Horsemanship
programme.desc: As Angela relives haunting memories of an attack on her family, she detains a mysterious man who claims responsibility for Tulsa’s most recent murder. Elsewhere, an original play is performed for an audience of one.

programme.title: Watchmen: She Was Killed by Space Junk
programme.desc: Following a late-night visit from the Senator who authored Masked Policing Legislation in Oklahoma, FBI agent Laurie Blake heads to Tulsa to take over the recent murder investigation. Far away, the Lord of the Estate draws unwelcome attention.

programme.title: Watchmen: If You Don't Like My Story, Write Your Own
programme.desc: Reclusive trillionaire Lady Trieu finally enters the stage with a mysterious offer. With Blake getting closer to the truth of her coverup, Angela enlists Looking Glass for help. Meanwhile, the Lord trains two new servants.

programme.title: Watchmen: Little Fear of Lightning
programme.desc: The origin story of Looking Glass is at last revealed, as is the truth behind the greatest hoax in American history. Far away, the Smartest Man in the World plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Watchmen: This Extraordinary Being
programme.desc: Conflicted, damaged superheroes navigate a dystopian future.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Movie: The Town
programme.desc: While planning his next bank heist, a career criminal juggles his feelings for a bank manager from a previous robbery.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Right
programme.desc: A young woman falls in love with a seemingly perfect guy, except he has one major flaw: he's a professional assassin. As the criminals who employ him start to come after him, she must decide if she'll run away or join in the mayhem.

programme.title: Movie: Tanner Hall
programme.desc: Four teenage girls learn about life while living in an all-girls boarding school in New England.

programme.title: Movie: For Love of the Game
programme.desc: A pitcher reflects back on his life and career as he works on throwing the perfect game.

programme.title: Ferrell Takes the Field

programme.title: Movie: Bicentennial Man
programme.desc: A robot tries to become human when he realizes that he has emotions and creative thoughts.

programme.title: Movie: Wall Street: Money Never Sleeps
programme.desc: A young Wall Street trader partners with a disgraced, former trader to alert the financial world of the impending doom.

programme.title: Movie: The Hurt Locker
programme.desc: A team of bomb technicians with only a few days left on their tour of Iraq, struggle to control their reckless new sergeant. The new leader puts the excitement of urban combat ahead of the safety of his men, forcing them into deadly situations.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Movie: The Fugitive

programme.title: Back to Life

programme.title: Back to Life

programme.desc: Krystal Stubbs doubles down on her husband's dreams while he wrestles with leaving his job. Cody loses a friend, but meets his hero.

programme.title: Movie: Moon

programme.desc: In 1920's Vienna, a little girl's godfather gives her a special doll on Christmas Eve. This nutcracker comes to life and takes her into a magical fantasy world.

programme.title: Movie: School of Rock
programme.desc: Kicked out of his rock band, flat broke and lacking any job skills whatsoever, Dewey Finn fakes his way into a job as a substitute fourth-grade teacher at a stuffy private school. Once there, he teaches the kids about rock and roll.

programme.title: Movie: Den of Thieves
programme.desc: After a series of daring bank heists are staged across Los Angeles, an elite unit is tasked with tracking down the group responsible, but the criminals are planning their biggest heist yet: robbing the Los Angeles branch of the Federal Reserve Bank.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: After being dumped by her future husband, an unconventional educator sets out to marry a rich substitute teacher. While battling for his attention and being pursued by the gym teacher, she teaches her class, and everyone else a unique type of lesson.

programme.title: Movie: Hulk

programme.desc: After successfully rekindling their relationship in spite of, rather than because of, their couples therapy, Louisa and Martin start living together again in the surgery. Meanwhile, Portwenn is abuzz with activity for the preparation of a wedding.

programme.desc: After successfully rekindling their relationship in spite of, rather than because of, their couples therapy, Louisa and Martin start living together again in the surgery. Meanwhile, Portwenn is abuzz with activity for the preparation of a wedding.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries: Room Without a View

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: She's Got Us

programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Cruel and Unusual: Botched Executions
programme.desc: Lethal injection has experienced a series of botched executions in several states including Ohio, Arizona, and Oklahoma.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure

programme.desc: In Tulsa, a man is shot and killed when a stranger sees an opportunity to good to pass up. In Atlanta, an escalating argument ends with one man dead and the other in danger.

programme.title: The First 48: The Cover Up/ Bad Seed
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a man is shot dead in an empty courtyard. Then in Dallas, a 72-year-old grandmother is found beaten to death inside her home.

programme.title: The First 48: Red Brick/ Last Kiss
programme.desc: After a number of women are murdered in East Cleveland, residents fear there may be a serial killer on the loose. In Dallas, a young father is shot to death in his girlfriend's arms, in the back of his car.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Game Friendly
programme.desc: Find out what tricks make Michael the most nervous, when the show needs extra security on hand and which trick was tried 18 times before anyone noticed.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Elevated Ferret Alert
programme.desc: Find out which trick made it hard for Michael to walk the next day, what trick was added at the last minute after a prop broke and what animal Michael fosters during shoots.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room

programme.title: The Misery Index: So That's Murder Then?
programme.desc: Jameela shows us there are some things you don't want to find in your toilet. Saul shows us how to ruin a wedding. A pants-wetter and a forgetful husband battle for the chance at the grand prize.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
