programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Procrastinators/ The Shell
programme.desc: Gumball inadvertently cracks open Penny's shell and discovers who she really is inside. While performing a school play, Gumball is so nervous about kissing Penny that he accidentally headbutts her and cracks open her shell.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Stink. Stank. Stunk.
programme.desc: When a skunk comes seeking its annual revenge on Chef, Duncan sees it as an opportunity to get a vacation from daycare.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: All Up in Your Drill
programme.desc: Duncan stages a small coup to oust Courtney as their official class firefighter so that he can wear the shiny firefighter helmet, until he smells smoke in the classroom and begs her to take her job back.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Harold Swatter and the Goblet of Flies
programme.desc: After finding what he believes to be a magic wand, Owen accidentally turns Harold into a housefly.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Toys Will Be Toys
programme.desc: Courtney becomes a toy tester but forgets that the most important thing is to have fun.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Books/ Lazy Sunday
programme.desc: A book brings the Titans' thoughts to life and they must fight their own imaginations. Robin tries to make Cyborg and Beast Boy more active by getting a treadmill.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Starfire the Terrible/ Second Christmas
programme.desc: Robin tries to teach the other Titans about real estate, but they're only interested in finding a villain to fight.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Mirror/ The Burden
programme.desc: When Gumball refuses to forward a scare email, the curse becomes all too real; Gumball and Darwin are put in charge of their school's ancient hamster.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Bros/ The Man
programme.desc: Granny Jojo brings a boyfriend to her birthday meal; The Wattersons and Larry both have a terrible day.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Hot Sauce

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Kitty

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Crowbar Jones: Origins
programme.desc: Grizz screens an epic amateur movie he just made for a focus group, but people start leaving.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Road Trip
programme.desc: Chloe and the Bears take a road trip to see a meteor shower. Ice Bear, the only one licensed to drive, is put in charge, which becomes harder than he thought.

programme.title: American Dad!: The Adventures of Twill Ongenbone and His Boy Jabari
programme.desc: Francine tries to teach Roger the value of hard work after his character 'Twill Ongenbone' fakes a degree in archaeology, but she quickly regrets her decision.

programme.title: American Dad!: Blood Crieth Unto Heaven

programme.title: River Monsters: Africa's Deadliest
programme.desc: Jeremy returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to investigate a pack-hunting carnivore blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. This time, he decides to put on his dive gear and offer himself as live bait in croc-infested waters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Atomic Assassin
programme.desc: An extreme angler is on the trail of a monster that leads him to the site of the worst nuclear accident in history, Chernobyl.

programme.title: River Monsters: Alaska's Cold Water Killer
programme.desc: For years fishermen have been vanishing in Alaska's remote and unforgiving wilderness, their deaths unseen, their bodies never found. For freshwater detective Jeremy Wade, a recent fatal incident sends him on a search for possible suspects.

programme.title: River Monsters: Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy's cases usually involve freshwater culprits, but with multiple reports of a deep water serial killer in Mexico's 'Sea of Cortez', he must step out of his comfort zone and into unchartered depths in search of the red devil.

programme.title: River Monsters: Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous monster of Loch Ness and to succeed where so many have failed. The journey takes him from the depths of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland, all in pursuit of the mother of all monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: After two men vanish from a remote lake in Malaysia, Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait.

programme.title: River Monsters: Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy journeys to Nepal where rumours of a deadly man-eating catfish have surfaced, and tries to determine if the Goonch has returned, or if a new monster is on the loose.

programme.title: River Monsters: Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous monster of Loch Ness and to succeed where so many have failed. The journey takes him from the depths of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland, all in pursuit of the mother of all monsters.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous monster of Loch Ness and to succeed where so many have failed. The journey takes him from the depths of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland, all in pursuit of the mother of all monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters: European Man-eater
programme.desc: The Wels Catfish is an aggressive predator of man-eating proportions.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Journey to the Red Center
programme.desc: Steve and Terri investigate the harsh outback interior of the remote center of Australia. They travel to Ayers Rock, the red sand dunes of the Simpson Desert and discover the endangered Bielby's and Perentes snakes.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Pint-Sized Pups and a Ferret
programme.desc: A Miniature Schnauzer pup tries to befriend a high-spirited ferret. A Maltipoo pushes the boundaries set by her young parents. And, a German Shorthaired Pointer pup wants to prove the she's the ultimate hunting dog, but is shown up by a cat.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Sky Diver's Nightmare
programme.desc: In Austin, a professional skydiver, is being terrorized by his two high-flying Savannahs. Wolfie, a Maine Coon, is notorious for pooping all over Heather and Bijan's house and then covers up the evidence with their belongings.

programme.title: The Zoo: Mending Willow
programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: The Zoo: Andre the Baby Goat
programme.desc: A markhor goat gives birth to Andre, the biggest baby of the year. A baby bat requires human care before it can be reintroduced to its colony. Later, confiscated lizards destined for the pet trade require urgent medical attention.

programme.title: Give a Dog a Home: Live!
programme.desc: There are thousands of animals in shelters across the U.S. in need of good, loving homes. Now Animal Planet, with Best Friends Animal Society, wants to connect these animals directly to our viewers, live and in real time.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Most Valuable Puppy
programme.desc: Villalobos is invited to attend their first Puppy Bowl, but which lucky pup will represent the rescue? New parolee Spencer joins Tania on his first rescue mission. And, a couple from Florida visits VRC in search a dog to help heal their broken hearts.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Puppy's Journey Home
programme.desc: Villalobos is stretched thin when rescue calls come in one after another. A couple from rural Idaho visits the rescue, ready to open their hearts to a new friend. Mariah and parolee Leigh help a neighbor whose dog has become too much to handle.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Ice Out
programme.desc: The Maine wardens search under the ice of a frozen lake for the victims of the worst snowmobile accident in recent history.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome Home, Roscoe Jenkins
programme.desc: A successful Los Angeles talk show host heads home to the Deep South to reunite with his family. Once there, he learns how easy it is fall back into old rivalries.

programme.title: Movie: Enough
programme.desc: A working class woman finds her circumstances greatly improved after marrying a wealthy contractor. After learning of his abusive tendencies, she goes on the run and trains herself to fight back.

programme.title: Movie: Training Day
programme.desc: A police officer's first day leads him to believe that his mentor may not be what he seems.

programme.desc: Will becomes childishly jealous when his mother arrives for a visit with a new boyfriend.

programme.desc: Danny may be in over his head when he takes on his first boat. Kevin is left behind for a speedy Plymouth Superbird while Danny breaks one of his cardinal rules by going all in on a custom trike frame.

programme.desc: The guys try to take a beat up '68 Mustang Fastback and turn it into Steve McQueen's old "Bullitt" ride within Rick's modest budget.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tour de Pants
programme.desc: A customer is brought to tears when the shop presents him with a chopper dedicated to his lost mother. Later, Danny surprises his band member with a hippy van, while Mike and Scott race to settle a score.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Charger Surprise
programme.desc: Danny decides to feature the 12 favourite cars in his collection in an official Count's Kustoms calendar, and later, a customer wants Danny to build him a classic Charger just like his dad used to have.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count's Calendar
programme.desc: The huge photo shoot day for the Count's Kustoms calendar is approaching. Danny has decided to have his guys each find, and take a picture with, their dream car for the back cover.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Baggers Can't Be Choosers
programme.desc: A customer wants to trick out his 2004 Harley-Davidson Road Glide, but both Shannon and Ryan aren't sure they can do everything he wants. A fellow collector drops by dangling a rare 1970 Lincoln Mark III in front of Danny, who can't wait to take her out.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Swap Meet Mayhem
programme.desc: When Danny challenges the guys to come up with innovative money-making ideas for the shop, Shannon proposes building a bike from parts picked up at a swap meet, and Mike ups the ante by challenging Shannon to do it all in one day.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Drive: One Love, One Car
programme.desc: Ziggy Marley commissions a restoration of his father, Bob Marley's, vintage Mercedes.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Marleymobile
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck as the shop rushes to finish restoring the last car Bob Marley ever owned.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Not So Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: The shop agrees to build a brave father a hot rod wheelchair, and Danny gets stuck in a bind when a pink car project doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Muscle Memory
programme.desc: Kevin is won over by a hotrod pick-up truck. Danny tracks down a customer's original 1969 Firebird, but its terrible condition may make it impossible to restore, and an unannounced visitor causes drama at the shop.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Fast and Furry-ous
programme.desc: Danny scores a pimp-tastic 1967 Impala, but when it's time to hand over the keys to an important client, Danny doesn't think he can let her go. Meanwhile, Roli does the unthinkable and puts the shop's top project in jeopardy.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Down by the Riviera
programme.desc: Legendary rocker George Lynch from the metal band Dokken stops by with his very cool 1965 Buick Riviera. He gives Danny free rein to put the Count's Kustoms rock 'n' roll touch on it. Also, Roli and Horny Mike custom wrap Roli's detailing van.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The King and the Count
programme.desc: Kevin and the team come together to make something special for Danny. Meanwhile Danny runs into an old pal and his 1959 Corvette gasser, but it's a ride once owned by the King himself that brings Danny to his knees.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Snider's Ride
programme.desc: Dee Snider of Twisted Sister stops by Count's Kustoms to have Danny turn his brand new Tesla into a rock 'n' roller's ride. But when strange things start happening, the guys aren't sure if it's blown a fuse or if it's possessed.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Naughty Nomad
programme.desc: When a client rolls into Count's Kustoms with a beautiful 1955 Chevy Nomad, Danny can't help but want the car for his collection. While the owner wants a simple paint job Danny and Ryan have a hard time doing simple.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Run It Like You Brung It

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Kink-achoo!
programme.desc: A marmoset visits the clinic for a wellness exam with Dr. K, Dr. Thielen is flummoxed by a bunny with a huge growth in her uterus, and wild birds come in for various treatments.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Knights of the Round Stable
programme.desc: Over at the Michigan Renaissance Festival, Dr. Pol takes a look at the hooves of a limping horse named Maverick, a jousting giant scheduled to compete at that day's tournament.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Squeal of Fortune
programme.desc: It's Dr. Pols birthday, but before the celebrations can begin, there's a bevy of cases for the Pol Veterinary staff.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: One Hot Llama
programme.desc: The leaves have changed and the first hints of winter appear in central Michigan. Dr. Pol and the PVS crew are still hard at work servicing the farms and small animal owners of Isabella County and the surrounding areas.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Freezin' Pol'd
programme.desc: Even the dead cold of a Michigan winter can't stop clients from coming into the Pol Veterinary Clinic.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Haunting in the Heartland
programme.desc: New discoveries of a cluster of UFO sightings in the American heartland suggest a government cover-up, and to prove it, a team of experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate why so many sightings are occurring in such a remote area.

programme.title: Alien Planet Earths
programme.desc: The search for Earth's twin is the hottest topic in astronomy. Thanks to NASA's ground-breaking Kepler mission, astronomers believe there are over 20 billion alien worlds with liquid water and therefore the potential for life.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Message
programme.desc: Take a look at what might really happen if we got a message from space. Scientists and sci-fi writers, with cooperation from SETI and Carl Sagan's son, Nick, unravel the impact of this world changing event.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Arrival
programme.desc: Take a look at how humans may react when an alien spacecraft makes its way to Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Search for Alien Life
programme.desc: New discoveries are helping experts get steps closer to uncovering alien life in our universe, and using cutting-edge technology and the latest scientific methods, an exciting trail of evidence challenges everything we know about the cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Life and Death on the Red Planet
programme.desc: Life once existed on Mars, but a series of devastating mass extinctions have made present-day life nearly impossible. The latest science shows how Martian life keeps bouncing back as it transforms from a blue watery world like Earth into a desert planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Seven Earths
programme.desc: The new discovery of seven alien Earth-like planets in a faraway solar system is a major milestone in our hunt for extraterrestrial life, and experts investigate the secrets of TRAPPIST-1's mysterious worlds to reveal if we're truly alone in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Life and Death on the Red Planet
programme.desc: Life once existed on Mars, but a series of devastating mass extinctions have made present-day life nearly impossible. The latest science shows how Martian life keeps bouncing back as it transforms from a blue watery world like Earth into a desert planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: Weird barren rings in the Namib Desert, an island the size of Manhattan that vanishes without trace and a lost city in the heart of the Amazonian jungle. What on Earth? Investigates six more mysteries captured from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Mummy Desert
programme.desc: New evidence could reveal the remains of an ancient Roman city thought to be lost forever. Strange images from a remote and empty desert could explain the mysterious mummies found there. An apocalyptic sandstorm swallows the Middle East.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters of Diamond Desert
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past. When a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Ghost Yacht and Freaky Fires
programme.desc: Three friends disappear from their catamaran off the coast of Queensland. In a Sicilian village, ordinary items spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Flannan Lighthouse and Aleshenka: Russian Mummy
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Siberian Lake Serpent and Mystery of the Bosnian Pyramid
programme.desc: For centuries, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.desc: Steve Claggett and Rich Emberlin are called out to help execute an arrest warrant on a gang of suspected crack-cocaine dealers barricaded inside a house; the SWAT team's tactical skills are put to the test as they overcome the barriers-to-entry.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.desc: A fire chief's wife is found burnt to death in her home. An autopsy reveals the cause of death was not the fire, but a gunshot to the head, shocking this small Louisiana town. This arson turned homicide leaves a killer to be found.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder Among Friends
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, a popular teen goes for a run around her hometown in Maine. Days later, her savagely beaten body is found. But what happened remains a mystery for years, until her mother intervenes and forces police to re-examine the case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood In the Sand

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: The Vendetta

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: Dr. Margo Prade is shot to death in the parking lot of her own medical practice in Akron, Ohio, and the senseless act shocks the city. Police are baffled. Until they discover that Margo's phone calls were being secretly recorded.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Vanished
programme.desc: So-Cal surfer and tech entrepreneur, Chris Smith, dreams of making a tidy sum of money and then surfing off into the sunset. It seems his dreams have come true, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: Dr. Margo Prade is shot to death in the parking lot of her own medical practice in Akron, Ohio, and the senseless act shocks the city. Police are baffled. Until they discover that Margo's phone calls were being secretly recorded.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Vanished
programme.desc: So-Cal surfer and tech entrepreneur, Chris Smith, dreams of making a tidy sum of money and then surfing off into the sunset. It seems his dreams have come true, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: The Vendetta
programme.desc: Texas judge Julie Kocurek was shot multiple times, by an unknown man, in front of her teenage son, in the driveway of their home. She survived and shares her emotional story and her work to stop others from being targeted.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hannah Graham: Deadly Connections
programme.desc: University of Virginia student Hannah Graham went missing in Charlottesville, Virginia and was ultimately found murdered. Hannah went missing after a night out with friends. This case lead police to other cases of unsolved attacks spanning a decade.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hannah Graham: Deadly Connections
programme.desc: University of Virginia student Hannah Graham went missing in Charlottesville, Virginia and was ultimately found murdered. Hannah went missing after a night out with friends. This case lead police to other cases of unsolved attacks spanning a decade.

programme.title: Disappeared: The Silent Son
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Macin Smith doesn't come home from school, his parents worry is he in danger. A note hidden in his wallet leaves his family troubled. Police attempt to piece together the puzzle, while his family vacillates between hope and despair.

programme.title: Disappeared: On a Mission
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman moves to the United States for a new opportunity, but in a mere matter of weeks, she vanishes without a trace. Kidnapping survivor, Elizabeth Smart, joins in the search to find her in this mystery where the clues are sparse.

programme.title: Disappeared: Lost Angel
programme.desc: 19-year-old Angel Garcia disappears after riding his dirt bike around Hartford CT. Friends say Angel was chased by a mysterious SUV before he disappeared. Months Later, a possible sighting in a convenience store 15 miles from home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Janet's Secret
programme.desc: She was murdered at 23, five suspects and the police couldn't arrest anyone, it was the perfect crime until now.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Pact
programme.desc: For more than four decades a mother wondered who had killer her son, he was 15 years old when he left for a Knights of Columbus dance and was murdered. His killers kept a secret for 41 years, now someone is ready to talk about the murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Amy Gellert?
programme.desc: Amy Gellert was just 21 when she interrupted an intruder holding he parents hostage in their Florida home. Startled by the headlights of her car, the man brutally stabbed her parents and then killed her. Her parents survived, but Amy never made it inside.

programme.title: Diabolical: Til' Death Do We Part
programme.desc: Lyle and Carol Kopenskey are high school sweethearts who marry after graduation. The couple that other couples want to be like. But after 40 years of marital bliss, an old friend returns to the fold and jealousies turn passions into cold blooded murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Living Off the Dead
programme.desc: George Kalomeris is a family man who looks after the less fortunate in his community. But after a dying man fingers George as the gunman, police discovera monster more diabolical than anyone could ever imagine possible. ...and he's not acting alone.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Lies
programme.desc: In 2015, Detective Scott Sanderson finds himself solving one of the strangest cases of his career. At its center are a newborn and her missing mother. Before long he'll uncover a diabolical scheme that will destroy the lives of everyone it touches.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Dead and Deleted
programme.desc: A mom of 3 in Georgia is killed after vanishing from home. Vital clues in the form of audio files captured by her tech-obsessed husband may be key to solving the mystery. As cops scrutinize the sounds, they make a grim discovery that betrays her killer.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Dallas Stoudemire: The Hero of El Paso
programme.desc: Lawlessness runs rampant in a notorious Texas outpost and it's up to legendary lawman Dallas Stoudenmire to tame the town known as 'Hell' Paso.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia
programme.desc: Turn-of-the-century Little Italy is a dangerous place, but as New York City's first Italian-American detective, Joe Petrosino is determined to do whatever it takes to protect his people.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: The Backyard Bling Out
programme.desc: This home's big backyard is a huge selling point but there's a lot of wasted space. Rob and the ninjas get down to business installing a landing pad, a luxury hanger and getting the run-down tennis court ready for action.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Working Out the Foyer
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas get a workout tackling a massive chandelier in the foyer and heavy exercise equipment in the club room. In the game room, a custom mural makes a statement and adds a touch of old-school charm to a modern space.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Extreme Exterior
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas take the exterior to the extreme by installing estate gates and revamping the landscape. It's all hands on deck to give this property some kicking curb appeal that will bring buyers to the door.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: A Modern Master
programme.desc: Rob takes the master bedroom to the edge by adding an exclusive balcony and luxurious details fit for modern royalty. Custom drapes and plenty of bling are enough to make this master suite sing.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Bringing Back the Bath
programme.desc: Rob and his crew pull out all the stops to make the master bathroom one for the history books. A custom stretch ceiling takes the space to new heights, while a gold-plated bathtub is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Racing to the Reveal
programme.desc: With the open house days just away, Rob and the crew are putting the pedal to the metal to finish their most epic renovation to date.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Inspirations Brewing
programme.desc: When Chase and his brother-in-law learn that the owner of their latest cabin project works at Allagash Brewing Company, they're excited to check out the brewery for inspiration as they turn the weekend getaway into a three-season home away from home.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Artists' Nautical-fantasy Tiny House
programme.desc: After moving in with parents to save for medical school, high school sweethearts are ready for their own one-of-a-kind space for their family of four.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Family of Five's Tiny House
programme.desc: With the help of a builder, a family of five in Oklahoma gets creative to fit comfortably into a tiny home. The home's features include nesting beds, a staircase with drawers and a closet door serving as a room divider.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Funky Futuristic 'Tiny'
programme.desc: An architecture student builds a futuristic tiny home that can withstand the harsh Canadian winters and be his home base while he trains for the Olympics. Every aspect of this high-tech tiny is overflowing with intricate and meticulous detail.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Globetrotters' Tiny House
programme.desc: Globetrotting newlyweds have been adventuring since the day they met and now want a tiny home base for in between travels.

programme.title: Containables: A Great Room With Great Views
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen raise the bar by taking on their biggest container home yet for a homeowner who wants a home where her entire family can bunk down and enjoy the amazing views her property affords.

programme.title: Containables: Container Home Away From Home
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen work to build a container home for the in-laws when they come to visit their new grandson. With only four weeks to complete the project, the couple must must tackle 20-foot and 40-foot containers.

programme.title: Containables: Containers of Staggering Size
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen want to change the way people think about container living and start by tackling their biggest build yet. They stagger two 40-foot containers and open the walls between them to create a massive great room.

programme.title: Containables: Deadlines and Due Dates
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design a three-container structure in the Smoky Mountains of North Carolina. Dealing with tricky terrain and inclement mountain weather, the team enlists their families' help to install bowling alley wood countertops, patio doors and more.

programme.title: Containables: Hurricanes and Golf Balls
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design and build a container home for a local couple's adopted son and fill it with fun features like a lofted bed, hydraulic TV winch and an outdoor fire pit. A second container has a custom workshop and a rooftop driving range.

programme.title: Containables: Stacking the Decks to a T
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen are eager to begin work on a very special container home that combines a unique design with the scenic beauty of South Texas. The home consists of three containers stacked to create a cantilevered look with multi-level decks.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Mission Revival Mansion
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a mother and her grown-up children restore their majestic 1913 Mission Revival mansion. He's elated when he realizes he can restore the original linoleum in the kitchen, but the homeowners may not open to the idea.

programme.title: Restored: 1930 Simple Spanish Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett helps a recently-divorced mom who is in over her head with her cute Spanish bungalow in Riverside, California. He opts for a simplistic approach in his restoration of the exterior areas and kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1910 Arts and Crafts Family Farmhouse
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1910 arts and crafts farmhouse for a family who relocates from the big city to the countryside of Cherry Valley, California. They hope to become organic farmers and want to include elements for the family farm and business.

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Colorful Spanish Colonial Farmhouse
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1930s two-story Spanish Colonial farmhouse in Fontana, California. He learns the rich history of the home which then guides his design plan for the house exterior, entryway, living room and kitchen.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads for the Lone Star state to eat his way through the Texas State Fair in Dallas, featuring some inventive foods like the bacon-tilla and the indulgent masterpiece of chicken fried lobster.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The French Toast Connection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the San Diego County fair in California, for breakfast with a bang, indulging in French toast bacon bombs.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Billings, MT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Billings, Montana, to tackle a one-hour steak challenge featuring a 78-ounce rib eye and two pounds of mashed potatoes, salad and bread.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Bread

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Manipulated

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Designing Spaces: Tips and Techniques to Help Upgrade Your Home
programme.desc: Inspiring viewers to take on all home improvement challenges and decorating dilemmas.

programme.title: Movie: A Country Christmas Story
programme.desc: A young girl pursues her dream of becoming a country music star against her mother's wishes.

programme.title: Movie: A Perfect Christmas List
programme.desc: After a health scare, a woman conjures up a last wish list of tasks for her daughter and granddaughter to do with the hopes of repairing their strained relationship.

programme.title: Movie: A Snow Globe Christmas
programme.desc: A cynical woman looks into the perfect world of a snow globe and rants how movies she produces fall short to real life. Smashing the globe she hits herself and wakes up in a perfect snow covered town. Trying to return home, she begins to find happiness.

programme.title: Movie: Twelve Men of Christmas
programme.desc: When her boss and fiancé betray her, a New York public relations executive finds herself in a small Montana town. She soon discovers that, when it comes to matters of the heart, a small town is just as complicated as the big city.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murdered Babysitter
programme.desc: A babysitter is found brutally murdered in Santa Ana, California, with five young children left in the home unscathed. The parents are quick to point to a local transient who had previously burglarized the house.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Mississippi Mother
programme.desc: Sabrina Butler, a 17-year old woman, arrives at a Mississippi hospital with her baby dead on arrival. Nurses and doctors suspect foul play, and Sabrina cannot give straight answers about what happened to her baby.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Panic at 10,000
programme.desc: Over the skies of North Texas, Kevin and Heather have grabbed themselves a Lear jet. But when a mechanical failure leads to a dangerous imbalance in the jet's fuel load, Kevin Lacey must descend through a building storm to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle Runs Again
programme.desc: Moonshine's prodigal son, Tickle, returns from a year in jail to the Appalachian backwoods. With long-time partner, Tim, determined to stay legal, Tickle recruits an old friend to make an inaugural run of shine and re-stake his claim as an outlaw shiner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle in a Pickle
programme.desc: With shine selling at $200 a gallon, Tickle returns to the woods with two notorious outlaw shiners. Mark and Digger rediscover Popcorn Sutton's mystery multi-grain shine, and Mike dumps his partner and hires a new hand to construct a hidden still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Corn-fed Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark and Digger contend with an unruly herd of cattle standing between them and their new still site. Tickle pulls Tim back to the woods to rediscover his roots on the outlaw side. Mike and Jerry devise a plan to access a perfectly hidden still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Tim's Temptation
programme.desc: With Extra Shine bonus scenes: Tim and Tickle rediscover their passion for outlaw life while Mark Rogers designs a custom pot still that will allow him to double distill. Later, Mark and Digger build a copper mailbox still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle's Big Run
programme.desc: Tickle mashes in his first large scale run of outlaw shine in years. Mark and Digger scramble to save their Popcorn legacy mash from runaway livestock. Mike ditches Daniel for a new full-time partner. Mark and Huck double their proof and their price.

programme.title: #TeamTrees: 20 Million Trees by 2020
programme.desc: Engineer Mark Rober and a YouTube phenom MrBeast team up to plant 20 million trees by January 1, 2020.

programme.title: How It's Made: Recycled Skateboard Guitars, Solar Street Lights, and Dolls
programme.desc: Recycled skateboard guitars, solar street lights and dolls are made.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle's Big Run
programme.desc: Tickle mashes in his first large scale run of outlaw shine in years. Mark and Digger scramble to save their Popcorn legacy mash from runaway livestock. Mike ditches Daniel for a new full-time partner. Mark and Huck double their proof and their price.

programme.title: #TeamTrees: 20 Million Trees by 2020
programme.desc: Engineer Mark Rober and a YouTube phenom MrBeast team up to plant 20 million trees by January 1, 2020.

programme.title: How It's Made: Recycled Skateboards, Braided Pastry, Construction Trailers
programme.desc: This episode includes recycled skateboards, braided pastry, construction trailers and metalworking vases.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Business
programme.desc: Each year, dozens of US craft distilleries fail, and Tim Smith knows why. In this episode, Tim and his team of experts help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery 'put the woods back in the whiskey,' in hopes of turning it from problem to profit.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Renowned bear handler Jeff Watson says goodbye to his family and friends and sets out on an adventure into the wilderness of Southern Indiana. Out there, he will teach his two 700lb grizzly bears Bob and Screech how to survive on their own in the wild.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: To Teach a Bear to Fish
programme.desc: Jeff releases his bears, Bob and Screech into the habitat where he begins his lifelong dream of re-wilding them. However the first lesson, fishing, proves more difficult than Jeff imagined and Bob appears to be falling behind Screech.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: What About Bob?
programme.desc: Jeff teaches the bears to forage in the wild, but Bob's foot is still a concern. When the bear slashes Jeff in the arm he refuses medical care. After he loses the bears, Jeff is forced to think about the difficulty of them actually leaving the nest.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Bears on the Run
programme.desc: Jeff's unconventional hunting lessons fail to prepare Bob and Screech to hunt game in the wild, but he discovers they may be learning on their own. Meanwhile he reminisces about Grizzly Adams and agonizes over eventually parting ways with his bears.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Teenage Bears
programme.desc: Jeff is pleased with Bob and Screech learning how to feed themselves. Now he teaches them how to den up for the winter. The grizzlies get territorial when Jeff's friend steps inside their habitat.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Letting Go
programme.desc: As Jeff's rewilding journey with Bob and Screech nears the end, he has one painful lesson left to teach, how to fear man.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Buffalo Trail
programme.desc: The wolf pack seizes an opportunity to stockpile meat with their first ever buffalo hunt. Brothers Noah and Bam are left to build a mine-cooled meat locker and keep the ranch running in anticipation of the family's return.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Beware the Bear-Crow
programme.desc: As bold new predators encroach increasingly closer to the family's ranch, the Browns devise inventive solutions to defend their livestock. Gabe's long-distance girlfriend makes her first, long-anticipated visit to the mountain.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Mountain Emergency
programme.desc: A medical emergency on the Wolfpack's ranch forces the family to become more resourceful as they continue to build their dream on the mountain. Gabe's hasty leap toward marriage has the family concerned.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Winter Is Here
programme.desc: As the first snow falls, the Brown Family makes a risky attempt to move their temporary shelters closer to the barn in hopes of bringing father Billy back home. Noah uses his ingenuity to prepare he and his pregnant wife Rhain Alisha for her first winter.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: King of the Mountain
programme.desc: With winter closing in, the Wolfpack races to build their homes before the ground begins to freeze. Later, a snowstorm threatens progress as they haul Bear's new house up to the highest peak on the mountain.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Wolfpack vs. the Wolf
programme.desc: The Brown family gets ready to defend themselves against dangerous new predator that's stalking their ranch.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Crying Bride
programme.desc: Heather plans a big banquet hall blowout, while Aretha relies on help from her friends for her college campus affair.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and an Aircraft Carrier
programme.desc: Guests dress for Kimberly's Halloween-themed ceremony, while a tiger attends Lindsay's country chic nuptials. Water, sand and driftwood adorn Crissy's wedding, while Amy decorates her aircraft carrier venue.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Shark Tank
programme.desc: Celeste's couture gown has a removable layer that reveals a feathered skirt underneath. Marisol holds her reception inside a theatre.

programme.title: The Little Couple: Our First Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the household and this year the holiday has more significance than ever. It's Bill and Jen's first holiday as parents and they're eager to make new memories.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: It's Beginning to Look a Lot like Quintmas
programme.desc: After getting bad news about Hazel, Danielle's determined to make this the best Christmas ever. But Adam has different plans for the holiday, which may sour the celebration. The quints perform in the Christmas show, but stage fright may take center stage.

programme.title: Counting On: Five Pregnancies and Counting
programme.desc: Five Duggars are pregnant. The ladies attend a garden party to celebrate. Ben and Jessa take a trip down memory lane five years after their engagement. Josiah and Lauren are concerned when their gender reveal balloon floats away. Jessa goes into labour.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Just Look Cool
programme.desc: Much to Moriah's excitement and disbelief, she and Kim plan out a college tour. Micah tries his hand at modeling but nearly jeopardizes his career before it begins. Ethan, Olivia, Kim and Barry finally sit down to discuss their issues.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: After the request for Isaac to join the band is denied by Barry and Kim, the family divide grows. Kim and Barry try to do damage control by extending a large and surprising olive branch to Ethan and Olivia. Moriah shares her desire for college.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Megan Mullally
programme.desc: Megan Mullally delves into a shocking pattern of dysfunction in her father's line. She discovers that her two times great-grandmother defied societal norms to fight for her family's survival, all the while struggling to hang on to her own sanity.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Mandy Moore
programme.desc: Actress Mandy Moore is shocked to discover ancestors that lived in Australia, and travels far, determined to unlock the mystery of how they got there. She's touched by the courage of those who made the journey and the sacrifice of those who did not.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: Casey creates fun and unique ways to capture the babies growing up.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: Summer's End
programme.desc: The family celebrates the end of summer together at a nearby water park.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: Turning 2
programme.desc: Ethan and Casey go all out for the special day and scramble to make an outdoor winter wonderland in Texas for the kids.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing
programme.desc: Profiles four shopaholics who use coupons to save thousands of dollars and amass huge stockpiles of goods. These shoppers dumpster dive for coupons and spend hours a day searching the Internet for deals.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Joni and Angelique
programme.desc: Joni supports her family of nine along with her charities through couponing. Angelique stays up all night planning for her shopping trip.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Missy and Amy
programme.desc: Missy plans to make over $50 using coupons; Amy plans to buy over $400 worth of groceries for under $10.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Living Apart
programme.desc: Theresa experiences her first dose of living apart from Larry as she spends time with her kids and father. Finding healing in her work, Theresa gives a special gift to skeptical newlyweds channeling both of their fathers who died before their wedding.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: You Don't Forget Your Past
programme.desc: Anna's friends have concerns about Mursel. Tania and Syngin butt heads. Blake and Jasmin's reunion falls flat. Natalie anxiously waits for Mike's arrival in the Ukraine. Juliana is third wheel when she finally meets Michael's ex.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: We Need to Talk
programme.desc: Mike learns of Natalie's past heartbreak. Anna weeps in a wedding dress. Anny has issues with Robert's exes. Emily doubts Sasha's dedication. Jasmin meets Blake's friends. Tania reveals she's leaving for a month. Juliana movies into Michael's new house.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tracie and Sammie
programme.desc: Tracie Thoms had a connection with a fan named 'Sammie,' but Sammie suddenly disappear and Tracie wonders who Sammie really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kaden and Adriana
programme.desc: Nev and co-host Kamie Crawford help lovestruck Kaden figure out if his four-year relationship with sexy Adriana is real. What's crazy is Kaden actually met Adriana IRL.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Robin and Wayne
programme.desc: It's been three years and Robin is ready to meet her attractive yet elusive online love in real life. Nev and Max want to help, but what they uncover may be too much for Robin to handle.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Michael and Chanelle
programme.desc: Michael felt he had no time for a relationship, but love appeared in a DM. Chanelle is the light he's needed in his life, but out of the blue she's disappeared, leaving only Nev and Max to help him find his missing love.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion (Part 1)

programme.desc: Country music star Tyler Farr teaches Rob, Sterling and Chanel to learn when it's 'time to retire' and start some 'workplace throw-downs.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Merchant of Vegas
programme.desc: The guys check out a Cushman scooter allegedly used by paratroopers during WWII.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick's a Riot
programme.desc: Rock out with the Pawn Stars when a 1969 Gibson Les Paul jams into the shop. Then, Chum tries to score with a Los Angeles Lakers backpack signed by members of the 2004 team. Later, Corey calls Rick out on his most annoying habit.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Eye of the Tiger
programme.desc: A banner from the World War II secret airborne division, The Flying Tigers, infiltrates the shop. Then, things get messy when a 1980s Ooze-It toy seeps in. Later, Rick is muted by an unsigned illustration from the silent film era.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Prohibition Pawn
programme.desc: A Civil War drum; 1834 book with the original rule to baseball; a 1970s skateboard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of Liberty
programme.desc: An original Beach Boys surfboard, a magazine feature penned by Mark Twain, an early 1900s spirit hydrometer, and an originial Peter Max Statue of Liberty painting.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Stairway to Pawn
programme.desc: A talking Herman Munster doll, a bass guitar signed by John Entwistle from the 'Who' and John Paul Jones from 'Led Zeppelin', a rare 1867 Proof Shield Nickel.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Balloon Payments
programme.desc: Rick may cross the line when he calls in a surprise expert for an appraisal on a Ronald McDonald balloon inflator. Chum pursues an antique RCA inkwell, while Corey sets his sights on a vintage spear.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Pawn of Lies
programme.desc: Two original lithographs by graphic artist M.C. Escher; a censored recording made on a Soviet X-ray; a Wells Fargo model stagecoach; a 1950s toy lie detector.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Highly Explosive Pawn
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck when a British Navy gunpowder bucket blasts into the shop and a seller approaches the Pawn Stars to present them with a past prop from 'Back to the Future, Part II.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Payne in the Putt
programme.desc: By a stroke of luck, a pair of knickers that belonged to golfer Payne Stewart swing into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn to the Rescue
programme.desc: Rick is in search of his own personal fire truck. Then, Chumlee chases an antique from one of the very first underground transportation systems, and Corey and Rick pursue an exclusive item that belonged to Hunter S. Thompson.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Chuminator
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee head to L.A. to 'terminate' a deal on set pieces from the iconic movie 'The Terminator'. Then, Corey checks out some pieces of Alice in Chains memorabilia. Plus, Rick and Chumlee test some old steel printing plates.

programme.desc: The Intelligence unit investigates a string of murders linked to a Colombian drug cartel. Meanwhile, a rookie is pulled from the police academy to join the team.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Wrong Side of the Bars

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: The staff of Pol Vet Services has one head scratcher after another, from the peculiar to the downright bizarre. With over 19,000 clients, it's only a matter of time before the vets are presented with a unique case that they've never seen before.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cowhide and Seek
programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Fix-It-All
programme.desc: Clients take matters into their own hands and our vets have a slew of do-it-yourself doctoring to repair. As if they're not busy enough at the clinic, Dr. Pol, Diane and Charles embark on some ambitious home improvement projects at the lake house.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Feline and Sinker
programme.desc: From gimpy goats to belligerent bulls, families all around are relying on Pol Veterinary Service to take care of their animals this summer.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: Unearthed: Empire State Building: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech helps experts explore The Empire State Building, one of the wonders of the modern world, like never before, revealing the secrets of its construction and the mysteries hidden deep in its foundation.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries of the Stone Age Gods
programme.desc: New discoveries at Stonehenge and other mysterious sites are revealing the secrets of the people who lived in Great Britain thousands of years ago, and using the latest technology, experts might finally uncover why these strange structures were built.

programme.title: Forbidden History: King Arthur's Forbidden Secrets
programme.desc: New evidence is challenging everything we know about the legend of King Arthur, and using the latest hi-technology archaeological methods, experts are making discoveries that could confirm or deny what we know about this mysterious figure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Stone Age
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets and ritual of the people who build the world's largest stone circle.

programme.title: Forbidden History: King Arthur's Forbidden Secrets
programme.desc: New evidence is challenging everything we know about the legend of King Arthur, and using the latest hi-technology archaeological methods, experts are making discoveries that could confirm or deny what we know about this mysterious figure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Examine new discoveries which are revealing the deepest and darkest secrets of Stonehenge, showing how ancient magic, bizarre rituals, and brutal murder built this strange monument.

programme.title: Unearthed: Treasures of the Terracotta Army
programme.desc: The Terracotta Army is one of China's greatest treasures, but there are still dark secrets surrounding this super-tomb. Newly discovered artifacts reveal the soldiers' supernatural enemy, and human remains point to ancient China's violent origins.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Forbidden City
programme.desc: For the first time, archaeologists use cutting-edge technology to discover what lies beneath China's Forbidden City, revealing the dark secrets of this mysterious mega-palace that have remained buried for nearly 600 years.

programme.title: Unearthed: House of Holy Relics
programme.desc: A medieval engineering marvel might be the home to the remains of the Bible's Three Magi, and we follow the scientists and experts who are delving deep into the mysteries of this incredible religious site.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Desert
programme.desc: The ancient city of Petra, a city carved from desert rock, has baffled experts for decades. Now, new technologies resurrect the city and reveal why the spectacular civilization was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Cruise Ship Colossus
programme.desc: The Crown Princess is a titanic cruise ship that weighs over 100,000 tons, and in a race against the clock, its crew must use the latest tech and cutting-edge engineering to prepare for their next voyage.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Titan of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: One of the largest ships of the Great Lakes is a mammoth freighter named the Algoma Sault, and she and her crew face deadly ice, killer fog, and treacherous canal crossings to safely transport 28,000 tons of coal in a race against the clock.

programme.title: Monster Ships: King in the North
programme.desc: The Helgafell is one of the largest vessels on the icy waters of the North Atlantic, and its crew uses the latest engineering and cutting-edge technology to cross a deadly ocean and deliver its goods before time runs out.

programme.title: Monster Ships: World's Biggest Sail Ship
programme.desc: The world's biggest sailing ship is an engineering marvel that uses five masts and 42 giant sails to navigate the deadly waters of the Caribbean, and using cutting-edge tech, this innovative vessel can reach high speeds using wind alone.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Mega Rig Overhaul
programme.desc: The Saipem 7000 is a gargantuan heavy-lift vessel equipped with two mega-cranes for world's toughest jobs, and now, she's faced with one of her hardest yet: upgrading a 30-year-old oil rig that sits in one of the most treacherous seas in the world.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Hell on Water
programme.desc: The Thermopylae is a massive vehicle carrier and one of the biggest ships ever built, and facing rough waves on deadly seas, her crew must navigate their priceless cargo to destinations on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Mega Machines: World's Wildest Roller Coaster
programme.desc: The Helix roller coaster is one of the greatest rides ever built, featuring state-of-the-art engineering to rocket thrill-seekers to speeds of over 60 miles per hour.

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.title: Female Forces: DUI's and Don'ts
programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.desc: The owner of a restaurant and bar, undergoing renovations, calls CPD for help when paranormal activity starts to scare away employees and brings construction to a halt.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.desc: Patrick and Danelle from Yonkers, New York, go above and beyond to help a schizophrenic patient who's had a hard time being taken seriously in the past. Far away in Austin, Texas, Holly and Chris have a scary run-in with poison control.

programme.title: Nightwatch: When Work Becomes Family
programme.desc: It's New Year's in New Orleans and gun violence is rampant as police and EMS deal with armed robberies and shootings. Plus, EMT Gavin returns to the job, and everyone celebrates a new addition to the family.

programme.title: Model Killers: Finger-Licking Good/ Slaying of a Tennessee Beauty Queen
programme.desc: A woman meets the perfect man to launch her modeling career, but is soon faced with a brutal reality. A beautiful farm girl moves to the city to pursue her modeling dreams, but winds up living a nightmare.

programme.title: Model Killers: Reality Kills
programme.desc: Three passionate, attractive men - and some very adoring fans - lust after a swimsuit model with a heart of gold.

programme.title: Model Killers: Model Murderer/ Strangled Beauty
programme.desc: An ambitious male model with a physique to die for is about to become an international sensation -- but not in a way he could have foreseen.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: The Sound of Terror
programme.desc: In 1983, the Secret Service are on the trail of a counterfeiter. In a storage unit, they find sickening audio recordings of him torturing dozens of women. Analyzing the tapes, they realize that he may be one of the most depraved serial killers in history.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Sex, Lies and Audiotape
programme.desc: A mom accused of the murder of a stranger must clear her name by secretly-recording a confession from the man she claims is framing her. Sordid revelations of a secret life lead police to prove the guilt of an obsessive, cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seen at Susan's
programme.desc: On April 12th 2008, Susan Casey vanishes after a night out. The only clues left behind are suspicious drag marks outside her home. CCTV footage reveals three different suspects on the scene. The police must find out who is lying.

programme.title: See No Evil: Don't Get in the Truck
programme.desc: On February 18th 2014, Emily Lambert goes missing after spending the night at a hotel bar with her new boyfriend. Two days later, she's found murdered on remote farmland. Detectives scour CCTV footage from the hotel and bar searching for her killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Shape of a Killer
programme.desc: After three similar murders, Austin, Texas police began to wonder if a serial killer was on the loose. A man out for a late night walk testing a thermal imaging nightscope might have captured images of the killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: My Friend, the End
programme.desc: When 18 year-old Harmahn Smith goes missing, his parents call on the CMPD to find him. Detectives run down every lead searching for the teenager, ultimately discovering the terrible details of what had begun for Harmahn as an uneventful night out.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: Body Cam: Disorderly Conduct
programme.desc: A police officer tracks down an armed carjacker and comes under heavy fire. A stabbing in broad daylight forces the police to take decisive action. A routine traffic stop results in an officer being shot and fighting for his life.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: My Friend, the End
